data.title: US Foods (NYSE: USFD) to review Q2 2025 results in conference call on Aug 7 at 8am CDT. Dial 877-344-2001, Conference ID 2528845. Replay available.
data.description: US Foods Holding Corp., a publicly traded company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol USFD, will be holding a live conference call and webcast to discuss its second quarter results for 2025. The event is scheduled for Thursday, August 7, 2025, starting at 8 a.m. CDT. Individuals interested in participating can join the conference call by dialing 877-344-2001. Participants should dial in at least 10 minutes before the scheduled start time and provide the Conference ID 2528845 to be connected. A replay of the call will also be made available following the event. For those who wish to listen to the replay of the conference call, details on how to access it will be provided.

data.title: JPMorgan may impose fees on data aggregators for crypto transactions, potentially crippling the industry, warn experts.
data.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM) is contemplating implementing fees on transactions involving cryptocurrencies and third-party services, a move that could have a substantial impact on the fintech sector, according to experts. The plan revolves around charging data aggregators like Plaid and MX each time a customer initiates a fund transfer from their JPMorgan Chase account to a cryptocurrency account or a third-party service like Robinhood (NASDAQ: HOOD). These aggregators are commonly utilized by crypto firms and fintech companies to access customer accounts within major financial institutions such as JPMorgan Chase. Concerns have been raised by industry insiders that the introduction of these fees could render it economically impractical for many consumers to utilize stablecoins and cryptocurrencies. There are fears that the proposed fees might severely harm the crypto industry, with some anonymous industry executives suggesting that the move could potentially force businesses to increase their prices by up to 1000%. Find the latest price of JPM stock here. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: DT Midstream (NYSE: DTM) to reveal Q2 2025 results on July 31, 2025, before the market opens. Earnings call scheduled.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, DT Midstream, Inc. (NYSE: DTM) revealed their intention to release their financial results for the second quarter of 2025 before the market opens on Thursday, July 31, 2025.

data.title: CrossAmerica Partners will report Q2 2025 earnings on August 6.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that a significant increase in COVID-19 cases has been recorded in the region. The total number of new cases has surged to a record high of 2,500 in the past week alone. This spike in infections has raised concerns among health officials and the public alike. Additionally, the total death toll due to the virus has now reached 500, highlighting the severity of the situation. Authorities are urging the population to adhere to safety guidelines and protocols to curb the spread of the virus. The rising numbers serve as a stark reminder of the ongoing threat posed by the pandemic and the importance of taking necessary precautions to protect against it.

data.title: Taiwan Semiconductor reports a 38.6% Y/Y net sales increase of $30.07 billion. Stock soars as demand rises.
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSM) experienced a significant stock surge after exceeding analyst expectations with its second-quarter results driven by high demand for its advanced processor technologies crucial for artificial intelligence applications. The company, a key supplier for tech giants like Nvidia and Apple, reported quarterly net sales of $30.07 billion, up 38.6% year-over-year, surpassing the analyst consensus estimate. Net income and earnings per share also saw significant growth. An optimistic revenue forecast for the third quarter further boosted investor confidence. Advanced technologies accounted for 74% of total wafer revenue. The article discusses the company's significant role in the global tech ecosystem.

data.title: Ferguson Enterprises to pay dividend of $0.83/share on Aug 6, 2025, to stockholders of record as of June 20, 2025.
data.description: Ferguson Enterprises Inc. (FERG) revealed its plan to issue a dividend of $0.83 per share on May 29, 2025. This payout is scheduled for August 6, 2025, for shareholders on record as of June 20, 2025. For those using Depositary Interests in CREST, the default currency for the dividend will be pounds sterling unless an alternative currency is chosen. For more information, interested parties can find additional details regarding the announcement.

data.title: PA Energy & Innovation Summit highlights $92 billion investment in PA. Peoples Natural Gas supports development.
data.description: In Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, the state's biggest natural gas utility is prepared to assist with the development of data centers and related projects following the announcement of a massive $92 billion investment statewide. This news was unveiled during the Pennsylvania Energy & Innovation Summit. Essential Utilities' gas division, Peoples Natural Gas, participated in the summit's expo where energy and tech businesses gathered. Peoples displayed their support for the innovative initiatives while being a key player in the energy industry.

data.title: Energy Fuels is now producing heavy rare earth element oxides at pilot scale, targeting commercial production by Q4 2026.
data.description: Energy Fuels has started manufacturing heavy rare earth element oxides at its White Mesa Mill on a pilot scale. They aim to potentially produce separated heavy rare earth oxides commercially by the fourth quarter of 2026 using current feed sources. If a production decision is finalized, this could significantly contribute to the overall rare earth production, creating a substantial impact on the industry.

data.title: Behavox reports 102% increase in client adoption for Alert Review Services due to growing demand for compliance operations.
data.description: Behavox, an AI company specializing in transforming data into insights for business protection and improvement, has revealed significant growth in its Alert Review Managed Services. There has been a noteworthy 102% increase in client adoption within the last quarter. This spike in adoption underscores the rising demand in the industry for flexible, skilled, and vendor-neutral compliance operations to manage the escalating number of alerts and the constraints of internal resources. The adoption has been widespread, involving 1st line reviewers.

data.title: Senator Lummis raised concern over reports of the US selling off 80% of its Bitcoin reserves, leaving just around 29,000 coins.
data.description: Senator Cynthia Lummis, a strong supporter of cryptocurrency, expressed concern over reports indicating a significant decrease in the amount of Bitcoin held by the U.S. Government. It is reported that over 80% of the Bitcoin reserves have been sold off, leaving just approximately 29,000 coins. Lummis criticized this move, calling it a strategic mistake that sets the U.S. back in the Bitcoin race. The information was revealed in a government document obtained through a Freedom of Information Act request by journalist L0la L33tz. The document disclosed that the U.S. Marshals Service, a branch of the Department of Justice, currently holds $28,988.35 BTC.
